description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 7

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, F

In preparation for this technique, you must spend 2 rounds drawing a seal on the ground, requiring a Craft (Calligraphy) check (DC 20), which provokes attacks of opportunity. The seal covers the surface of a single 5 ft square, within which you must stand when performing this technique.

You ingest some blood belonging to the target, and attempt to link your bodies together. If the target succeeds at its save, the seal you drew vanishes and the technique ends. If they fail, your skin turns black, with a white, skeletal outline. While the subject is within range, any damage or healing you take is also given to the target, and the same is true for any physical effect inflicted upon you (such as poison), even if you are immune to such an effect, though the target does receive its own save against the effect, if it allows for one. This link also works the other way, so you share any damage, healing and physical effects inflicted upon the subject. If you hold a Small or larger weapon, you can provoke a massive damage save for yourself, or make a coup de grace attack on yourself, with the target suffering appropriate damage and needing to make a save as well.

The link is only active while you stand on the seal, and its effects become inactive until you return to the seal. Once the duration expires, the seal vanishes. Material Focus - A drop of the target's blood.
